focus: [D1-3/D1] impeccable distill/clarify/bolder/quieter/delight flows vs design-interface residual transformation craft

graphEvents.label: Transform verbs recognized mainly by audit, not interface authoring
Interface transform application card for bolder quieter distill clarify delight
Distill requires essence and preservation proof
Delight requires earned moment proof across interface and motion

label: Transform verbs are mostly audit-side routing, not interface-side authoring workflows
recommendation: Add interface-owned transform_application guidance plus router-replay gold prompts for bolder, quieter, distill, clarify and delight.
enforcement: ENFORCEABLE for routing and card completeness; ADVISORY for creative quality.

label: Distill needs essence and preservation proof, not only one-bold-move restraint
recommendation: Add distill card fields for primary user goal, essential elements, removed/hidden/combined elements, preserved function and completion proof.
enforcement: ENFORCEABLE for artifact fields; PARTLY ENFORCEABLE in diffs; ADVISORY for whether the chosen essence is right.

label: Clarify has deeper UX-writing workflow than the current content gate
recommendation: Add clarify lane with audience, user mental state, UI state, current copy, rewritten copy, actionability proof, terminology consistency and localization check.
enforcement: ENFORCEABLE for before-after artifact completeness and static copy checks; ADVISORY for tone quality.

label: Delight lacks an earned-moment proof across interface and motion
recommendation: Add a Delight Moment card with moment type, register, emotional context, earned rationale, treatment, repeat behavior, opt-out, reduced motion, performance budget and non-blocking proof.
enforcement: ENFORCEABLE for card completeness and hard boundaries; ADVISORY for user-perceived delight.

label: Transform routing and transform utilization should be separate checks: router-replay proves mode selection, card fields prove applied reasoning.
Current audit transform_remediation maps bolder/quieter/distill to owners, but interface lacks matching first-class transform authoring workflow.

direction: Add only more prose to design_principles.md
reason: The gap is enforceability: router aliases, gold prompts and fillable transform cards are needed to prove utilization; prose alone would remain advisory.
